name: First Community Bank
description_short: Lexington, SC First Community Bank at 5455 Sunset Blvd serves the local community with banking services.
description_long:
First Community Bank's Lexington, SC location is situated at 5455 Sunset Blvd, a standalone banking facility serving the local community. The branch provides full-service banking in a convenient Sunset Boulevard setting for Lexington residents. While specific branch hours aren't listed, you can contact the location directly to confirm operating times before visiting.

This Lexington banking location offers deposit accounts, loan services, and general banking support. For details on specific services available at this branch or to speak with a representative, contact the 5455 Sunset Blvd location directly. The team here can assist with personal and business banking needs.

When visiting the Lexington branch, bring your ID and any relevant financial documents for your banking needs. First Community Bank is committed to serving SC communities with reliable banking services.
services: Business+ online banking platform for business customers
Mortgage lending (home purchase, refinance, and related products)
Financial consulting services through First Community Financial Consultants
Fraud education and customer protection resources
pros: 30+ years of local community banking experience with established track record of growth from 2 to 20+ locations
Personalized service model with direct access to real people and dedicated banker relationships rather than automated systems
Comprehensive service offerings including personal/business banking, mortgages, loan products, and financial consulting with CFP® professionals
Multiple modern digital banking channels (online banking, mobile apps for iOS and Android, Business+ platform) alongside in-person service
FDIC-insured member bank with South Carolina charter, providing regulatory safety and credibility
Strategic merger activity showing financial stability (recent Signature Bank integration, multiple past acquisitions)
Fraud education resources and customer protection programs (PPP scam awareness materials, security prioritization)
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to South Carolina and northeast Georgia only, unavailable for customers outside these regions
Website lacks specific information on account features, interest rates, fees, minimum balance requirements, or product-specific terms
No transparent comparison of rates or features relative to other banks or pricing details for loans and mortgages
Limited online presence and digital marketing compared to larger regional or national banks; minimal social proof or customer reviews visible
Website enrollment link for online banking is non-functional (returns application error at https://b053202208.flex.online-banking-services.com)
best_for: Small to mid-sized business owners in South Carolina or northeast Georgia seeking personalized banking relationships with dedicated business bankers
Personal banking customers in SC/GA service areas prioritizing local community bank service and face-to-face relationships over digital-only banking
Homebuyers in their service regions seeking mortgage services with local lending expertise and personalized consultant support
Customers requiring comprehensive financial planning services combined with banking, such as business owners needing long-term growth guidance
diagnosis: First Community Bank is best for small-to-mid-sized business owners and personal banking customers located in South Carolina or northeast Georgia who value personalized, relationship-based banking from a locally-rooted community bank with 30+ years of experience. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation—the bank only serves SC and parts of northeast GA, making it inaccessible outside these regions, and detailed product rates, fees, and terms are not publicly available online.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: First Community Bank at 5455 Sunset Blvd, Lexington, SC. Convenient banking services.
